params.prompt: Use the attached reference photo as the source for a realistic premium founder portrait. Create a 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Composition: large elegant founder portrait on right, text stack on left. Keep his Thai male appearance, short dark hair, smiling expression, light gray blazer, black shirt, speaker confidence. Style: dark luxury tech, Midnight Luxe Editorial, black and graphite, silver-white typography, electric blue rim lighting, subtle chrome/circuit details. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Human, premium, credible, mobile readable, safe margins, no misspelled duplicate text.
